name: PDF Thumbnails
description: Automatically generates cover thumbnails for PDF files in your Jellyfin library by rendering the first page of each PDF. Supports configurable render resolution (DPI) and thumbnail padding mode.
overview: Generates thumbnail images from the first page of PDF files.

versions.changelog:
Fix: plugin no longer bundles native libSkiaSharp
- Exclude transitive SkiaSharp.NativeAssets.* packages pulled in by PDFtoImage
- Removes the libSkiaSharp binaries that shadowed Jellyfin's own copy and caused a fatal 'native libSkiaSharp library (119.0) is incompatible' crash that broke all image processing in Jellyfin

Fix: SkiaSharp version conflict causing fatal crash
- Downgrade PDFtoImage to 5.0.0 (uses SkiaSharp 3.116.x compatible with Jellyfin)
- Exclude SkiaSharp from plugin bundle; use Jellyfin's copy to avoid cross-context type conflicts
- Use byte array decode path to eliminate SKManagedStream finalizer risk

Initial release
- PDF first-page thumbnail generation
- Configurable render resolution (DPI)
- Configurable thumbnail padding mode (white, transparent, no padding)
